case_title: ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC VS. DESNE AHLERS et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT AHLERS, DESNE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-17-2008
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC SERVED JUN-20-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AHLERS, DESNE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AHLERS, DESNE $12,367.68 PRINCIPAL, $760.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,376.14 INTEREST, $355.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,858.82, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION PER CCP 395 (B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $355.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT AHLERS, DESNE
DECLARATION IN LIU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY [CCP 585] FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
